title: ruta graveolens var. crithmifolia
intro: Ruta graveolens var. crithmifolia, also known as Sea Rue or Crithmum maritimum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family, commonly found in coastal areas of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Ruta graveolens var. crithmifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
